primary_paper: Grounding DINO: Marrying DINO with Grounded Pre-Training for Open-Set Object Detection
authors: Shilong Liu, Zhaoyang Zeng, Tianhe Ren, Feng Li, Hao Zhang, Jie Yang, Qing Jiang, Chunyuan Li, Jianwei Yang, Hang Su, Jun Zhu, Lei Zhang
notes: Original open-vocabulary detector. Swin-T (662 MB) and Swin-B (895 MB) weights are public GitHub release assets. No official ONNX/TensorRT export exists in the repo. Local source pinned at 856dde2. Supporting papers: DINO, BERT, Swin Transformer (in papers/core_foundations/, not duplicated here).

primary_paper: An Open and Comprehensive Pipeline for Unified Object Grounding and Detection
authors: Xiangyu Zhao, Yicheng Chen, Shilin Xu, Xiangtai Li, Xinjiang Wang, Yining Li, Haian Huang
notes: NOT a standalone repository -- it lives inside MMDetection at configs/mm_grounding_dino/ (model: mmdet/models/detectors/grounding_dino.py; checkpoint URLs: configs/mm_grounding_dino/metafile.yml). The only one of the five with a first-party deployment path (MMDeploy, which ships a TensorRT plugin for MultiScaleDeformableAttention). Swin-T/B/L weights local. No prebuilt mmcv wheel exists for Jetson/aarch64. No DOI published. Local source pinned at cfd5d3a (mmdet v3.3.0).

primary_paper: Grounded SAM: Assembling Open-World Models for Diverse Visual Tasks
authors: Tianhe Ren, Shilong Liu, Ailing Zeng, Jing Lin, Kunchang Li, He Cao, Jiayu Chen, Xinyu Huang, Yukang Chen, Feng Yan, Zhaoyang Zeng, Hao Zhang, Feng Li, Jie Yang, Hongyang Li, Qing Jiang, Lei Zhang
planned_role: Measure whether precise masks improve target localization
notes: A PIPELINE, not a new base detector: Grounding DINO produces boxes, SAM produces masks. Has NO weights of its own -- reuses checkpoints/grounding_dino/ and checkpoints/sam/ (ViT-H 2.4 GB, ViT-B 358 MB). Academic foundations: Grounding DINO + Segment Anything (Kirillov et al. 2023, arXiv 2304.02643, in papers/core_foundations/). No video tracking. No DOI published. Local source pinned at 126abe6.

primary_paper: SAM 2: Segment Anything in Images and Videos
authors: Nikhila Ravi, Valentin Gabeur, Yuan-Ting Hu, Ronghang Hu, Chaitanya Ryali, Tengyu Ma, Haitham Khedr, Roman Radle, Chloe Rolland, Laura Gustafson, Eric Mintun, Junting Pan, Kalyan Vasudev Alwala, Nicolas Carion, Chao-Yuan Wu, Ross Girshick, Piotr Dollar, Christoph Feichtenhofer
planned_role: Full acquisition-plus-tracking baseline; closest system-level reference pipeline
notes: NO STANDALONE PAPER EXISTS -- Grounded SAM 2 is a software integration; the SAM 2 paper is used as its primary academic reference. See production/papers/04_grounded_sam_2/NO_STANDALONE_PAPER.md. api_required=false applies to the LOCAL path (Grounding DINO 1.0 + SAM 2, both with local weights). The repo ALSO ships API-backed demos for Grounding DINO 1.5, 1.6 and DINO-X, which have NO public local checkpoints, run on the DeepDataSpace cloud, and require an API_TOKEN -- those are out of scope and cannot ship on Jetson. SAM 2.1 weights local: hiera tiny/small/base_plus/large (149 MB - 857 MB). Local source pinned at b7a9c29.

primary_paper: PET-DINO: Unifying Visual Cues into Grounding DINO with Prompt-Enriched Training
authors: Weifu Fu, Jinyang Li, Bin-Bin Gao, Jialin Li, Yuhuan Lin, Hanqiu Deng, Wenbing Tao, Yong Liu, Chengjie Wang
planned_role: Newer prompt-enriched detector comparison; only system supporting visual prompts
notes: Standalone Grounding-DINO-derived detector (an MMDetection fork). The ONLY one of the five supporting visual prompts (AFVPG), in addition to text. Project page: https://fuweifuvtoo.github.io/pet-dino/. Authorship verified via arXiv -> project page -> GitHub -> author HF org 'fuweifu' (corresponding author Weifu Fu, Tencent YouTu). Weights verified public and ungated: pet_dino_swin-t_8xb4_12e_obj365.pth (2.2 GB) is the ONLY published checkpoint -- the in-repo Swin-L config has no released weight. Requires MM-GDINO Swin-T as initialisation (shared, not duplicated). No DOI published. Local source pinned at 7830a46.
